description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for 1 sec. Then enters [God's Proxy] state for 10 sec, empowering skills. [God's Proxy]: ATK increases by 264*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Normal Attack DMG increases by 100%. This effect cannot be dispelled.

ATK increases by 135*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), and Magic Evasion increases by [240->360]. When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 20%, and damage taken from non-hero enemies is reduced by 20%.

light.unified: Physical Evasion increases by [140->600] for the duration.

description.unified: [Valiant Dash] [(added) Increases DMG by {0}%] and reduces Cooldown by [???%->10%] upon a Crit Hit.
[Proxy of God] increases Dodge Chance by an additional [400->250] and ATK Spd by an additional {0} for the duration of the Skill.
[Goddess Strike] [(added) Increases DEF Boost by 50%, and own DMG dealt to bosses by {0}%] [(removed) Increases Magic Evasion by 360 and increases DMG dealt to heroes by {0}%].
